raw_consumer_statement:
I had an account/subscription with XXXX which I canceled in XX/XX/year>, but XXXX still charged my credit card ( master card Athleta ) {$430.00} for the next year 's subscription. I called the credit card company ( XXXX ) and asked them to remove this charge since my account was canceled and I did not authorize it. The credit card company removed the charge and issued a new credit card in XX/XX/year>. I received a new credit card but did not use it. On XX/XX/year> the credit card company sent me a summary statement that shows the amount of {$430.00} on the new card. 
When I called XXXX they stated that " their investigation '' determined that this charge was not fraudulent and they put it back on my card. I wanted to be clear that my concern is that this charge is unauthorized, not fraudulent. They opened a new investigation ( case # XXXX ). I asked them to cancel my card. 
I have an email from XXXX that my account was canceled.
